purpose: Split research candidates into near-term tactical setups and long-term macro/portfolio-balance candidates.
operatingRule: Candidates are research objects, not buy instructions. Promotion requires source evidence, add zone, invalidation, portfolio role, and risk budget.

tickerOfMoment.name: Alphabet
tickerOfMoment.thesis: Potential quality compounder if search/cloud/AI investment remains durable and valuation offers a cleaner margin of safety than hotter AI infrastructure names.
confirmBeforeAdd: Cloud and AI monetization progress is visible
Regulatory/search risks are priced in
Relative valuation is attractive versus existing platform holdings
tickerOfMoment.portfolioFit: Candidate may diversify portfolio factor exposure away from high-beta AI/liquidity concentration.

tickerOfMoment.name: NVIDIA
tickerOfMoment.thesis: Direct exposure to AI accelerator demand; useful benchmark for whether the portfolio should own the center of the AI capex stack instead of only cloud/platform beneficiaries.
confirmBeforeAdd: Forward revenue/gross-margin durability remains intact
Valuation reset or earnings growth justifies multiple
Customer concentration and export-control risks are understood
tickerOfMoment.portfolioFit: Candidate does not obviously worsen a dominant current exposure.

longTermMacroFit.name: Alphabet
longTermMacroFit.thesis: Potential quality compounder if search/cloud/AI investment remains durable and valuation offers a cleaner margin of safety than hotter AI infrastructure names.
confirmBeforeAdd: Cloud and AI monetization progress is visible
Regulatory/search risks are priced in
Relative valuation is attractive versus existing platform holdings
longTermMacroFit.portfolioFit: Candidate may diversify portfolio factor exposure away from high-beta AI/liquidity concentration.

longTermMacroFit.name: Vertiv
longTermMacroFit.thesis: Infrastructure-side exposure to AI/data-center buildout: power, cooling, and uptime constraints rather than model/platform winners.
confirmBeforeAdd: Backlog/order growth supports the AI infrastructure thesis
Margins remain resilient as capacity scales
Entry price compensates for crowded theme risk
longTermMacroFit.portfolioFit: Candidate does not obviously worsen a dominant current exposure.

longTermMacroFit.name: iShares Bitcoin Trust
longTermMacroFit.thesis: A cleaner vehicle to compare against levered/path-dependent crypto exposure; may reduce decay risk while preserving directional Bitcoin beta.
confirmBeforeAdd: Explicit risk budget for crypto beta
Liquidity regime supports risk assets
Expense, tracking, and drawdown profile beat levered alternatives
longTermMacroFit.portfolioFit: Candidate may diversify portfolio factor exposure away from high-beta AI/liquidity concentration.

longTermMacroFit.name: NVIDIA
longTermMacroFit.thesis: Direct exposure to AI accelerator demand; useful benchmark for whether the portfolio should own the center of the AI capex stack instead of only cloud/platform beneficiaries.
confirmBeforeAdd: Forward revenue/gross-margin durability remains intact
Valuation reset or earnings growth justifies multiple
Customer concentration and export-control risks are understood
longTermMacroFit.portfolioFit: Candidate does not obviously worsen a dominant current exposure.

longTermMacroFit.name: Broadcom
longTermMacroFit.thesis: Picks-and-shovels exposure to AI networking and custom ASIC demand with a more diversified enterprise/software profile than pure GPU exposure.
confirmBeforeAdd: AI semiconductor growth offsets cyclicality
Debt/software integration risk remains controlled
Price action is not purely multiple expansion
longTermMacroFit.portfolioFit: Candidate does not obviously worsen a dominant current exposure.
